audit_status.source_base: Greek Ephesians text tradition, draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: Compact complete draft reviewed for children/parents, enslaved/masters with safeguard, armor as spiritual resilience, prayer, Tychicus, peace/grace.

verses.restored: Children, obey your parents in the Lord, for this is righteous/just.
Honor your father and mother, which is the first commandment with promise,
so that it may be well with you and you may be long-lived upon the earth.
And fathers, do not provoke your children to anger, but nourish them in discipline and instruction of the Lord.
Enslaved ones, obey the earthly masters with fear/reverence and trembling, in sincerity of your heart, as to Messiah,
not according to eye-service as people-pleasers, but as enslaved ones of Messiah, doing the will of the Divine from the soul/life,
serving with goodwill as to the Lord and not to humans,
knowing that whatever good each does, this one will receive back from the Lord, whether enslaved or free.
And masters, do the same things toward them, giving up threatening, knowing that both their Master and yours is in heavens, and partiality is not with him.
Finally, be empowered in the Lord and in the strength of his might.
Put on the full armor of the Divine, so that you may be able to stand against the schemes of the adversarial one.
Because our wrestling is not against blood and flesh, but against rulers, against authorities, against cosmic powers of this darkness, against spiritual forces of harmfulness in the heavenlies.
Because of this take up the full armor of the Divine, so that you may be able to withstand in the harmful day, and having worked all things, to stand.
Stand therefore, having girded your waist with truth, and having put on the breastplate of righteousness/justice,
and having bound sandals under your feet in readiness of the good news of peace.
In all things taking up the shield of trust, with which you will be able to extinguish all the flaming arrows of the harmful one.
And receive the helmet of salvation/healing, and the sword of the Spirit, which is the word of the Divine,
through every prayer and petition, praying in every season in Spirit, and into this keeping alert in all perseverance and petition concerning all the holy ones,
and for me, that word may be given to me in opening my mouth, in boldness to make known the mystery of the good news,
for which I am an ambassador in chain, so that in it I may speak boldly as it is necessary for me to speak.
But so that you also may know the things concerning me, what I am doing, Tychicus, the beloved sibling and trustworthy servant in the Lord, will make everything known to you,
whom I sent to you for this very thing, so that you may know the things concerning us and he may comfort/encourage your hearts.
Peace to the siblings, and love with trust, from Divine Father and Lord Jesus Messiah.
Grace with all those loving our Lord Jesus Messiah in incorruptibility.

safety_note: Ephesians 6 must not be used to sanctify slavery, coercive parenting, or domination. The text is preserved as ancient household instruction, while verse 9 relativizes master power under the heavenly Lord and commands giving up threats. Armor imagery is spiritual resilience against harmful powers, not violence against people.
